name: arXiv Papers

releases.author: Ar4l
releases.description:
## arXiv Papers v1.0.2

Fork of [willjhliang/obsidian-papers](https://github.com/willjhliang/obsidian-papers) with arXiv rate-limit handling and OpenAlex fallback.

### Fixes
- Adds a shared `arxivRequest` helper: rate-limits requests to ≥3s gap (per arXiv's stated policy), wall-clock timeout (10s) to abort arXiv's tarpit, exponential backoff on HTTP 429/503 and consecutive timeouts.
- Falls back to OpenAlex when arXiv is rate-limiting your IP — common on VPNs, where the shared egress IP eats throttling from the whole pool.
- Adds an optional **Contact email** setting used as the OpenAlex `mailto=` polite-pool identifier.

### Install
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css` below and drop them into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/arxiv-papers/`, then enable in Settings → Community plugins.
